svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="Agentic-Gig-Flow" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-824" dy="-282" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1600" pageHeight="1200" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=22;fontStyle=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=#0078D4;" value="Agentic Gig-Flow — Microsoft 完結アーキテクチャ" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="800" x="40" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="subtitle" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=13;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=#5F6368;" value="4ユーザー × 4入口 → 共通の自律エンジン（4 Agent / Foundry gpt-4o）→ JPYC決済 / Cosmos記録" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="900" x="40" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="usersBand" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#5F6368;fillColor=#F8F9FA;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;dashed=1;fontColor=#5F6368;fontSize=12;" value="4人の登場人物（同じ会社・同じ Entra テナント）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="1520" x="40" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="userPM" parent="usersBand" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" value="田中CTO（PM）
発注する" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="300" x="40" y="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="userWk" parent="usersBand" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" value="Sato（Worker）

style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#82b366;fillColor=#f0f8ee;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#5b8a3c;fontSize=12;" value="共通の自律エンジン — 4 Agent（Azure OpenAI / Foundry gpt-4o）" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" value="Contract Agent
発注の構造化→Issue起票
(gpt-4o)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="320" x="40" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="agReview" parent="agBand" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" value="Review Agent
diff×検収基準を根拠引用で判定
(gpt-4o)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="320" x="410" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="agSettle" parent="agBand" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#e03131;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="Settlement Agent
★ LLM不使用＝決定的
ガードレール＋冪等送金" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="320" x="780" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="agBook" parent="agBand" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" value="Bookkeeping Agent
仕訳/源泉徴収/支払調書
(gpt-4o)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="320" x="1150" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="foundBand" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#5F6368;fillColor=#F8F9FA;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;dashed=1;fontColor=#5F6368;fontSize=12;" value="基盤（すべて Managed Identity ＝ コードに鍵なし）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="170" width="980" x="40" y="800" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cosmos" parent="foundBand" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#000000;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=none;html=1;fontSize=11;align=center;verticalAlign=top;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;labelPosition=center;shape=mxgraph.azure_2019.azure_cosmos_db;" value="Azure Cosmos DB
orders / events（companyId 分離）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="56" x="80" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kv" parent="foundBand" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#000000;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=none;html=1;fontSize=11;align=center;verticalAlign=top;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;labelPosition=center;shape=mxgraph.azure_2019.key_vaults;" value="Key Vault
ウォレット秘密鍵 / PAT" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="56" x="440" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="appi" parent="foundBand" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#000000;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=none;html=1;fontSize=11;align=center;verticalAlign=top;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;labelPosition=center;shape=mxgraph.azure_2019.application_insights;" value="Application Insights
orderId で全 Agent を分散トレース" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="56" x="760" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="openai" parent="foundBand" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#000000;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=none;html=1;fontSize=11;align=center;verticalAlign=top;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;labelPosition=center;shape=mxgraph.azure_2019.cognitive_services;" value="Azure OpenAI（Foundry / gpt-4o）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="56" x="260" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="polygon" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6f0;strokeColor=#d6336c;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="Polygon × JPYC
transfer() で円建て即時送金" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="240" x="1060" y="830" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fabric" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e7f1ff;strokeColor=#0078D4;fontSize=12;" value="Microsoft Fabric
Cosmos ミラー → Data Agent" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="220" x="1340" y="830" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_pm_cs" edge="1" parent="1" source="userPM" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="entCSbox"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_pm_dash" edge="1" <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_settle_polygon" edge="1" parent="1" source="agSettle" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#e03131;strokeWidth=4;fontColor=#e03131;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" target="polygon" value="transfer JPYC（約3秒で着金）"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_contract_cosmos" edge="1" parent="1" source="agContract" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="cosmos"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_settle_kv" edge="1" parent="1" source="agSettle" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=10;" target="kv" value="秘密鍵取得"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_book_cosmos" edge="1" parent="1" source="agBook" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="cosmos"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_settle_book" edge="1" parent="1" source="agSettle" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=10;" target="agBook" value="完了→記帳"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_book_cs" edge="1" parent="1" source="agBook" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;dashed=1;fontSize=10;" target="entCSbox" value="完了通知（Adaptive Card）"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_dash_cosmos" edge="1" parent="1" source="entDashBox" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;dashed=1;fontSize=10;" target="cosmos" value="注文照会"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_cosmos_fabric" edge="1" parent="1" source="cosmos" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=10;" target="fabric" value="ミラーリング"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_fabric_pbi" edge="1" parent="1" source="fabric" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="entPBIBox"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=11;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=#e03131;fontStyle=1;" value="凡例：赤線＝山場（PR merge → Settlement → 約3秒で JPYC 着金）。Settlement のみ LLM 不使用の決定的処理。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="1100" x="40" y="1000" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 25px; margin-left: 12px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #0078D4;
display: inline-block; font-size: 22px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#0078D4, #3fa6f5); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;
